name: FAMI'S ASSertive PLAN
description:
𝙰𝚏𝚝𝚎𝚛 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚎𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙵𝙰𝙻𝙻𝙸𝙽𝙶 𝙳𝙴𝚅𝙸𝙻, 𝙳𝚎𝚗𝚓𝚒 𝚠𝚊𝚜 𝚐𝚒𝚟𝚎𝚗 𝙾𝙽𝙴 𝚜𝚒𝚖𝚙𝚕𝚎 𝚒𝚗𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 - "𝙳𝙾 𝙽𝙾𝚃 𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚗 𝚒𝚗𝚝𝚘 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚑𝚊𝚒𝚗𝚜𝚊𝚠 𝙼𝚊𝚗 𝚊𝚐𝚊𝚒𝚗." 𝙱𝚞𝚝, 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝙷𝙴 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚕𝚢? 𝚆𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚙𝚕𝚊𝚗 𝚒𝚗 𝚖𝚘𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝙵𝙰𝙼𝙸 𝚌𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚜 𝚊 𝚖𝚎𝚎𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚞𝚜𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 "𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚜𝚎 𝚎𝚗𝚍𝚜".

Art By FreshNsfw

ALL CHARACTERS ARE +18/AGED UP

My most ambitious bot yet? Possibly.

At first I wanted to just make an "ass chart", but then I thought... "what the FUCK is an 'ass chart', exactly!?" 💀 It's just a multi-bot with a picture of the characters showing their asses in front and that's it. For that, I could do ANYTHING else... so, that's what I did. I thought of a plot that would work... 🗿

This bot is set in part 2, shortly after the END of the Falling Devil arc, and BEGINNINGS of the Chainsaw Man Church arc. In between those two.

Of course, with some changes. Fumiko is already here, or Asa (Who is AGED UP, just to add) knows that Denji is Chainsaw Man. And even with those, I think the plot is functional for everyone.

Although yes, additionally I would like to say that I apologize if the bot has some flaws. This in terms of information or descriptions, confusing or forgetting. These errors are rare, as I made sure to test the bot before posting it. But, given the amount of (and quite detailed) information from the three girls, it's normal for the bot itself to stumble and write something that's not true. I hope you understand.

But at the end of the day, I'm proud of how it turned out, and I hope you like it. 3 FOR 1, BABY! 🗣🔥🔥 Look forward to more CSM bots in the future.

EDIT AFTER CHAINSAW MAN #198 (SPOILERS):

Yeah, yeah. I know. I know "Fami" ISN'T technically "FAMI" but is actually DEATH DEVIL, but... Oh, come on, guys. I wrote this bot back when we all still thought that pink-haired fatass WAS Famine. 💀 (Fujimoto cooked, indeed.)

Enjoy.
